parameters.text:
=Given this system message for an Akinator-style character guessing AI:

{{ $json.system_message }}

Generate {{ $json.count || 50 }} diverse test cases for evaluating this agent. Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no markdown, no explanation.

Each object must have exactly these fields:
- id: sequential integer
- character: the full character name the user is thinking of
- chatMessage: the user opening message to start the game (e.g. I am ready to play, or Let us begin)
- context: full description of the character — type (fictional/real), gender, origin (movie/game/history/etc), defining physical and personality traits, notable facts — must be precise enough to answer any binary Yes/No question accurately
- thoughts: 6-10 key binary facts Akinator would likely ask about (e.g. fictional: yes, male: yes, wears a hat: yes, villain: no, from a video game: yes)

Diversity requirements across the whole set:
- 25% video game characters
- 25% movies or TV characters
- 20% historical figures or real celebrities
- 15% animated or cartoon characters
- 15% other (sports, literature, mythology, etc)
- 65% widely famous, 35% moderately known but not obscure
- Vary gender, nationality, and era
- Include at least 3 real (non-fictional) people
